title: brassaia sessilis
intro: Brassaia sessilis, also known as the Yellow Passion Flower, is a climbing vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Brassaia sessilis include its potential to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and other sleep disorders, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
